title: Tomato bacterial wilt + virus complex — no chemical control
body: For tomato bacterial wilt (Ralstonia solanacearum), bacterial canker (Clavibacter michiganensis subsp. michiganensis), and the four important virus complexes — TYLCV (whitefly-transmitted), Curly Top Virus (leafhopper), Tomato Spotted Wilt Virus (thrips), and Cucumber Mosaic Virus (aphid) — HORDI confirms there is no direct chemical control. Management is consolidated: use resistant / disease-free varieties, rotate with non-solanaceous crops, keep the field weed-free, practice field sanitation, and suppress insect vectors with DOA-approved insecticides.

body_translated.en: For tomato bacterial wilt (Ralstonia solanacearum), bacterial canker (Clavibacter michiganensis subsp. michiganensis), and the four important virus complexes — TYLCV (whitefly-transmitted), Curly Top Virus (leafhopper), Tomato Spotted Wilt Virus (thrips), and Cucumber Mosaic Virus (aphid) — HORDI confirms there is no direct chemical control. Management is consolidated: use resistant / disease-free varieties, rotate with non-solanaceous crops, keep the field weed-free, practice field sanitation, and suppress insect vectors with DOA-approved insecticides.
body_translated.si: තක්කාලි බැක්ටීරියා ගහනය (Ralstonia solanacearum), බැක්ටීරියා කැන්කර් (Clavibacter michiganensis subsp. michiganensis), සහ වැදගත් වෛරස් සංකීර්ණ හතර — TYLCV (whitefly මගින් සම්ප්‍රේෂණය), Curly Top Virus (leafhopper), Tomato Spotted Wilt Virus (thrips), සහ Cucumber Mosaic Virus (aphid) — සඳහා HORDI සෘජු රසායනික පාලනයක් නොමැති බව තහවුරු කරයි. කළමනාකරණය ඒකාබද්ධයි: ප්‍රතිරෝධී / රෝග රහිත ප්‍රභේද භාවිතා කරන්න, ඝන්ධාසී-නොවන බෝග සමඟ මාරුව කරන්න, ක්ෂේත්‍රය වල් පැළ රහිතව තබන්න, ක්ෂේත්‍ර සනීපාරක්ෂාව පවත්වා ගන්න, සහ DOA අනුමත කෘමිනාශක මගින් කෘමි වාහකයන් යටපත් කරන්න.
body_translated.ta: தக்காளி பாக்டீரியா வாட்டம் (Ralstonia solanacearum), பாக்டீரியா கேன்கர் (Clavibacter michiganensis subsp. michiganensis), மற்றும் நான்கு முக்கிய வைரஸ் வளாகங்கள் — TYLCV (whitefly-பரப்பப்பட்டது), Curly Top Virus (leafhopper), Tomato Spotted Wilt Virus (thrips), மற்றும் Cucumber Mosaic Virus (aphid) — ஆகியவற்றுக்கு HORDI நேரடி இரசாயன கட்டுப்பாடு இல்லை என்பதை உறுதிப்படுத்துகிறது. நிர்வாகம் ஒருங்கிணைக்கப்பட்டது: எதிர்ப்பு / நோய்-இல்லாத வகைகளைப் பயன்படுத்துங்கள், சொலனேசியஸ் அல்லாத பயிர்களுடன் சுழற்சி செய்யுங்கள், வயலை களை-இல்லாமல் வைக்கவும், வய தூய்மை பயிற்சியுங்கள், மற்றும் DOA-அங்கீகரித்த பூச்சிக்கொல்லிகளுடன் பூச்சி கேரியர்களை அடக்குங்கள்.

quote: Use disease free seeds; Weed free field and field sanitation; Reduce vector population (By insecticides).
